name: Zero Risk · Weekly Notion Report (Mondays 09:00 ECT)

_canon.purpose: Weekly Notion report · syntheses PostHog 7d events + Atlas snapshot into one Notion page in the `weekly` database every Monday 09:00 ECT.
_canon.activation: Inactive on import · Emilio activates after populating NOTION_TOKEN + NOTION_DATABASE_WEEKLY env vars in Vercel + verifying first manual run via n8n UI.
